problem id: 21312779
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11111000 -> 11101111
  10000100 -> 00011000
  11110101 -> 11110100
  11000011 -> 10011110
  00101110 -> 01011001
  11101101 -> 11000111
  00100100 -> 01001100
  10010001 -> 00110000
  10111110 -> 01101011

query: 11011010
predicted answer: 10101111
